results.correct_answer: Minerals containing metal content such as iron ore bauxite and manganese
incorrect_answers: Minerals without metal content such as mica limestone and gypsum

Renewable alternatives such as solar wind tidal and geothermal power

results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: Why is coal called a bulky raw material in energy geography?
results.correct_answer: Its high transport cost per usable energy unit influences plant location choices
incorrect_answers: It can only be moved by air freight
It has zero calorific variation across grades
It is lighter than natural gas in pipelines

results.name: Social Studies
results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: A key strategic advantage of diversified energy sources is that it
results.correct_answer: reduces risk from supply shocks and fuel price volatility
incorrect_answers: removes all transmission losses immediately
eliminates need for storage technologies
makes demand forecasting unnecessary
